top_signals.title: Iran says new U.S. strikes violate ceasefire
top_signals.summary: The war ⁠has caused an unprecedented oil supply shock, pushing up the costs of fuel, fertilizer and food.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US and Iran: the art of the possible
top_signals.summary: Stopgap agreement leaves key issues to be decided in later talks
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SEC Chairman Eyes ‘Gun-Jumping’ Rule Changes to Spur More IPOs
top_signals.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission is mulling changes to decades-old rules that prohibit companies from certain communications during the going-public process, as the Wall Street regulator looks to boost initial public offerings.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: New South Wales green lights $497M Copi critical minerals project
top_signals.summary: The mine will produce titanium minerals and rare earth elements including monazite and xenotime.
